abilities.name: purifying-salt
abilities.shortEffect: Protects from status conditions and halves damage from Ghost-type moves.
abilities.effect: The Pokémon’s pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.

abilities.name: sturdy
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead. Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon is at full HP, any hit that would knock it out will instead leave it with 1 HP. Regardless of its current HP, it is also immune to the one-hit KO moves: Fissure, Guillotine, Horn Drill, and Sheer Cold. If this Pokémon is holding a Focus Sash, this ability takes precedence and the item will not be consumed.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.

abilities.name: clear-body
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot have its stats lowered by other Pokémon. This ability does not prevent any stat losses other than stat modifiers, such as the Speed cut from paralysis. This Pokémon can still be passed negative stat modifiers through Guard Swap, Heart Swap, or Power Swap. This ability functions identically to White Smoke in battle.
abilities.flavorText: Prevents other Pokémon's moves or Abilities from lowering the Pokémon's stats.
